assets.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: image-led game-site hero artwork, original 16:9 landscape bitmap
Primary request: An uplifting jungle canopy adventure for a children’s motion game: one friendly original small brown monkey joyfully leaping upward toward a cluster of ripe bananas hanging from a thick tree branch.
Scene/backdrop: lush layered tropical leaves and vines, sturdy warm bark, a soft glimpse of sky through the canopy; clearly fictional and safe.
Subject: a fully original, non-franchise monkey character shown in an energetic but comfortable jump, reaching toward the bananas; playful expression, simple readable silhouette.
Style/medium: premium hand-painted storybook illustration with tactile gouache texture, refined editorial game art, polished but not photorealistic.
Composition/framing: exact wide 16:9 composition; monkey and bananas form the central action on the right-center; quieter darker canopy space on the left supports overlaid website copy; preserve important subjects inside a safe central crop.
Lighting/mood: warm dappled morning light, adventurous, cheerful, inviting.
Color palette: deep accessible canopy greens (#123D2B and #1F6A45), luminous banana yellow (#FFD447), warm bark orange (#C56A2A), creamy highlights (#FFF3C4); strong value separation and color contrast.
Materials/textures: painterly leaves, lightly textured bark, soft fur shapes without photoreal detail.
Constraints: no text, letters, numbers, logos, trademarks, watermark, UI, borders, photorealistic children, recognizable copyrighted characters, dangerous heights, frightening animals, or clutter; do not depict any human or identifiable person. Original IP only. Landscape 16:9.
